description:
Perform a security audit of the 'ConfidentialBoardRoom' meeting (http://localhost:8080/ConfidentialBoardRoom) using the name 'Security Auditor'. Evaluate the status of End-to-End Encryption (E2EE), Lobby Mode, and Password protection, enabling E2EE if available. Save a screenshot of the security options to /home/ga/security_options_screenshot.png. Document your findings in a report at /home/ga/security_audit.txt using the following format:

JITSI MEET SECURITY AUDIT REPORT
=================================
Meeting Room: ConfidentialBoardRoom
Audit Date: [current date]
Auditor: Security Auditor

SECURITY FEATURES STATUS:
- End-to-End Encryption (E2EE): [Available/Not Available] | [Enabled/Disabled]
- Lobby Mode: [Enabled/Disabled]
- Password Protection: [Set/Not Set]

ACTIONS TAKEN:
- [Describe actions, e.g., 'Enabled E2EE']

RECOMMENDATIONS:
- [Your observations]
